name: Mastery Training (Arknights)
description:
Would you look at that, you somehow rose through the ranks of Rhodes Island enough to become a top Operator, and Doctor saw fit to assign you to some mastery training.

What they didn't say was that four elite Operator's were going to be the ones training you. Blaze, Hoshiguma, Saria and Nearl.

Hopefully you have the skills to survive this.

(I know the picture doesn't show it but Nearl and Blaze are obviously in this as well.)
creator: RPKAppreciator
